bird.name: 灰腿穴䳍
bird.summary: 灰腿穴䳍（台湾作灰足穴䳍）（学名：Crypturellus duidae）是䳍科穴䳍屬的一种鸟类。 特征 灰腿穴䳍体重约426克，翼长约162.9毫米，嘴峰长约31.2毫米，喙宽度约5.4毫米，喙厚度约5.6毫米，跗蹠长约48.9毫米，尾长约41.5毫米。灰腿穴䳍在其分布区内为…

locations.name: 哥伦比亚
locations.summary: 哥伦比亚共和国（西班牙語：República de Colombia），通稱哥倫比亞（西班牙語：Colombia），是一個位於南美洲西北部的国家，同時是拉丁美洲第四大國家，為南美洲國家聯盟的前成員國（2018年8月退出）。它的北部是加勒比…

locations.name: 厄瓜多尔
locations.summary: 厄瓜多尔共和国（西班牙語：República del Ecuador），通稱厄瓜多尔（Ecuador），是位於南美洲西北部的國家，北面與哥倫比亞相鄰，南接祕魯，西面為太平洋，另包括距離厄瓜多本土1,000公里的加拉巴哥群島。 厄瓜多於18…

locations.name: 圭亚那

relations.subject: 灰腿穴䳍
relations.evidence: Grey-legged tinamous are native to South America, including Columbia, Peru, Ecuador, Guyana, Venezuela, and northern Brazil. However, its distribution could be even further as the population is sparsely distributed and found in fragmented landscape

relations.subject: 灰腿穴䳍
relations.evidence: In 2020 the IUCN classified the grey-legged tinamou as Least Concern, although there were calls to reclassified the species due to global population declines in the last two years in certain parts of their range. This is primarily due to increased threat from deforestation. The species is also threatened by hunting practices in the area. Indeed the regions the grey-legged tinamou is most commonly found is facing significant anthropogenic changes
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
